top_issues: ST60 dimensional inspection: Candidate bottleneck under launch conditions; verify staffing, fixture loading, and data capture time.
ST70 subassembly  /  packaging: Candidate bottleneck under launch conditions; verify staffing, fixture loading, and data capture time.
recommended_actions: Separate in-line dimensional checks from end-of-line release logic.
Review staffing and fixture loading at bottleneck-candidate stations.
Define traceability label area and scan point near side tab near connector window.
Reserve an end-of-line functional confirmation point for electronics-related checks.

cycle_time_assumptions.note: Cycle-time values are placeholders for planning discussion, not simulation outputs.

inspection_station_suggestions.suggestion: Use this station for in-line dimensional evidence and traceability capture.

bottleneck_candidate_notes: ST60 dimensional inspection: Candidate bottleneck under launch conditions; verify staffing, fixture loading, and data capture time.
ST70 subassembly  /  packaging: Candidate bottleneck under launch conditions; verify staffing, fixture loading, and data capture time.

rework_repair_station.rationale: Provides a controlled path for launch-phase defects without stopping the main flow.

operator_skill_sensitivity_notes: ST20 blanking  /  laser cut is high-sensitivity due to access, inspection, or setup dependence.
ST30 forming  /  bending is high-sensitivity due to access, inspection, or setup dependence.
ST40 pierce  /  tapping  /  hardware insertion is high-sensitivity due to access, inspection, or setup dependence.
ST50 deburr  /  clean is high-sensitivity due to access, inspection, or setup dependence.
ST60 dimensional inspection is medium-sensitivity due to access, inspection, or setup dependence.

line_engineering_assumptions.fastening_strategy: manual M5 screw fastening to display module

layout_review_notes: Separate incoming/kitting from dimensional verification to simplify launch ownership.
Prepare mirrored station standards for overseas rollout.
Use station grouping as an initial line concept before detailed PFEP and manpower balancing.
Treat traceability capture, repair flow, and functional confirmation as explicit line-design decisions for infotainment launch readiness.
